description: Fictional deterministic memories and scenarios for AEON-IQ benchmark proof runs.

memories.content: The benchmark user prefers Rust for backend service architecture.
expected_queries: Which language does the benchmark user prefer for backend service architecture?
Recall the user's Rust backend preference.

memories.content: The benchmark user schedules Nimbus planning reviews every Wednesday morning.
expected_queries: When are Nimbus planning reviews scheduled?
Recall the Wednesday morning Nimbus planning cadence.

memories.content: Nimbus benchmark prototypes store vector memories in Postgres with pgvector.
expected_queries: Which database stores Nimbus vector memories?

memories.content: The benchmark user requires audit trails before any memory deletion workflow ships.
expected_queries: What is required before memory deletion workflows ship?
Recall the audit trail deletion requirement.

memories.content: The benchmark user wants dense operator dashboards with restrained visual styling.
expected_queries: What dashboard style does the benchmark user prefer?
Recall the dense restrained operator dashboard preference.

memories.content: Nimbus benchmark runs must avoid live provider calls unless explicitly enabled.
expected_queries: When may Nimbus benchmark runs use live provider calls?
Recall the live provider opt-in policy.

memories.content: Narrative archival proof must verify L3 narrative memories and batch linkage.
expected_queries: What must narrative archival proof verify?
Recall the L3 narrative batch linkage requirement.
